```js title=main.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"../node_modules/pmodule/b.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  x: () => (x)
});
/* import */ var _tracker__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("../node_modules/pmodule/tracker.js");
var x = "x";
var y = "y";





(0,_tracker__rspack_import_0.track)("b.js");


},
"../node_modules/pmodule/c.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  z: () => (z)
});
/* import */ var _tracker__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("../node_modules/pmodule/tracker.js");
var z = "z";




(0,_tracker__rspack_import_0.track)("c.js");


},
"../node_modules/pmodule/index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
/* import */ var _tracker__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("../node_modules/pmodule/tracker.js");




(0,_tracker__rspack_import_0.track)("index.js");

/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = ("def");


},
"../node_modules/pmodule/tracker.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  log: () => (log),
  track: () => (track)
});
function track(file) {
	log.push(file);
	log.sort();
}

var log = [];

function reset() {
	log.length = 0;
}


},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var pmodule_tracker__rspack_import_3 = __rspack_require("../node_modules/pmodule/tracker.js");
/* import */ var pmodule__rspack_import_1 = __rspack_require("../node_modules/pmodule/b.js");
/* import */ var pmodule__rspack_import_2 = __rspack_require("../node_modules/pmodule/c.js");
/* import */ var pmodule__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("../node_modules/pmodule/index.js");




pmodule__rspack_import_0["default"].should.be.eql("def");
pmodule__rspack_import_1.x.should.be.eql("x");
pmodule__rspack_import_2.z.should.be.eql("z");
pmodule_tracker__rspack_import_3.log.should.be.eql(["b.js", "c.js", "index.js"]);


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
